_comment: Browser Safety Policy for OpenClaw Agent. Controls what browser actions require approval.

read_only.description: No approval required - information gathering only

form_input.description: Approval recommended - entering data into forms
examples: entering search queries on shopping sites
form_input.approval_message: The agent wants to fill in a form. Please review the data before proceeding.

financial_transaction.description: ALWAYS requires explicit approval - any money movement
financial_transaction.approval_message: ⚠️ FINANCIAL ACTION: The agent wants to complete a purchase/payment. Amount: {amount}. Confirm?

account_modification.description: ALWAYS requires explicit approval - changing account settings
account_modification.approval_message: ⚠️ ACCOUNT CHANGE: The agent wants to modify your account settings. Please review.

destructive.description: BLOCKED by default - requires manual override
destructive.approval_message: 🛑 DESTRUCTIVE ACTION BLOCKED. Use manual override to proceed.
